scenario.name: ESRP_BRIDGE_004
scenario.send:
INVITE urn:service:sos SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [$IF_ESRP_CHFE]:[local_port] From: <sip:[$CHFE_tel]@[$IF_ESRP_CHFE]:[local_port]>;tag=osp To: <urn:service:sos>;tag=chfe Call-ID: osptoCHFEcallid@[$IF_ESRP_CHFE] Cseq: 1 INVITE Contact: sip:[$CHFE_tel]@[$IF_ESRP_CHFE]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 Geolocation: <cid:location@[$IF_ESRP_CHFE]> Content-Type: multipart/mixed; boundary=next-content Content-Length: [len]
--next-content Content-Type: application/pidf+xml Content-ID: <location@[$IF_ESRP_CHFE]>
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <presence xmlns="urn:ietf:params:xml:ns:pidf" xmlns:gp="urn:ietf:params:xml:ns:pidf:geopriv10" xmlns:bp="urn:ietf:params:xml:ns:pidf:geopriv10:basicPolicy" xmlns:ca="urn:ietf:params:xml:ns:pidf:geopriv10:civicAddr" xmlns:gml="http://www.opengis.net/gml" entity="sip:location@[$IF_ESRP_CHFE]"> <tuple id="0"> <status> <gp:geopriv> <gp:location-info> <gml:Point srsName="urn:ogc:def:crs:EPSG::4326"> <gml:pos>40.71668300756087 -73.99069756654683</gml:pos> </gml:Point> </gp:location-info> </gp:geopriv> </status> <timestamp>2050-05-15T12:30:00Z</timestamp> </tuple> </presence>
--next-content Content-Type: application/sdp
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [$IF_ESRP_CHFE] s=- t=0 0 c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] m=text 49170 RTP/AVP 98 a=rtpmap:98 t140/1000

ACK urn:service:sos SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [$IF_ESRP_CHFE]:[local_port] From: <sip:[$CHFE_tel]@[$IF_ESRP_CHFE]:[local_port]>;tag=osp To: <urn:service:sos>;tag=chfe Call-ID: osptoCHFEcallid@[$IF_ESRP_CHFE] Cseq: 1 ACK Contact: sip:[$CHFE_tel]@[$IF_ESRP_CHFE]:[local_port] Content-Length: 0
